Home › FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Everything Guelph homeowners usually ask before booking — answered straight.

Get a Free Quote Call or Text
Do I have to sign a contract?

No. There are no contracts and no cancellation fees at Yardex. Start, pause, skip, or stop anytime with a text or email.

How fast will you reply to my quote request?

Within 24 hours, and usually much faster. We know most Guelph streets, so many quotes go out the same day.

Is Yardex insured and legitimate?

Yardex has operated publicly in Guelph since 2020, holds a registered BBB business profile, won a 2024 Quality Business Award, and has 53 five-star Google reviews. We’re happy to answer any due-diligence questions before you book.

What does mowing cost?

Weekly mowing starts at $27.50 per cut for smaller city lots, with trimming and blowdown included. See our pricing page for the full breakdown of what affects the price.

How does payment work?

You’ll receive clear, itemized invoices. E-transfer is the most popular option; we’ll confirm current payment methods with your quote.

What if it rains on my mowing day?

We move your cut to the next dry day and keep you posted. Your regular weekly slot doesn’t change.

Can I skip a week?

Yes — just let us know by the day before. In dry spells we’ll often recommend it ourselves so you’re not paying for a cut the lawn doesn’t need.

Do you bring your own equipment?

Always. We run commercial mowers and trimmers — you don’t need to supply or store anything.

Will it be the same people each week?

Yes. You get a consistent crew and a consistent day. Yardex is owner-run, so any questions go straight to Carter.

What height do you cut at?

About 3 inches — the healthiest height for Guelph lawns. It builds deeper roots and crowds out weeds.

Do you take away grass clippings and yard waste?

Clippings are mulched into the lawn by default, which feeds the soil (bagging available on request). Cleanup debris is hauled away — Guelph’s green cart doesn’t accept grass clippings, so we never leave you stuck with bags.

Do you offer fertilizer without a whole-season program?

Yes. Order one application or several — there’s no program enrollment and nothing auto-renews.

What parts of Guelph do you serve?

All residential Guelph — if you’re in the city, you’re on our map.

Can you do a one-time cut, or weekly only?

Weekly clients get scheduling priority, but we take one-time cuts and cleanups when the route allows — worth asking, especially early or late in the season.

Didn’t find your answer? Send us the question with your quote request or text (519) 835-0774.

Ready for the best lawn on your street?

Tell us about your property and we’ll send a free, no-pressure quote.

Get Your Free Quote

No contracts. No cancellation fees. We reply within 24 hours — usually much faster.

Yardex

Student-built lawn care in Guelph since 2020. A team of 5 with commercial equipment, 50 weekly lawns, and no contracts — ever.
